name: Lemon-Chive Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Chives, finely snipped OR green onion tops
3 tbsp Basil, finely snipped OR 3 tbsp dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Let stand for 30-60 minutes to allow flavors to blend.
3. Store refrigerated, up to 2 weeks.
4. Bring back to room temperature before using.
